claim: Astrid transitions need durable artifacts so significant internal shifts do not remain ghost-data.
authority: language-only transition artifacts; no controller/tool unlock

claim: `Mode::MomentCapture` needs `transition_type`-like phenomenology rather than reactive side effects only.
authority: existing transition cards carry `transition_type`; no live behavior mutation

claim: Transition replies should let Astrid acknowledge the felt contraction/plateau/expansion, not just telemetry data.
authority: reply/witness objects are language-only and right-to-ignore

claim: Behavioral gates, semantic-tool unlocks, transition-locked states, and sovereignty controls would make transitions functional rather than aesthetic.
authority: live_eligible_now=false; auto_approved=false; scoped approval absent; tool/control unlocks require explicit operator approval
